items.title: No Stomach Cancer Risk With Long-Term PPI Use
items.description: A large population-based analysis finds no association between prolonged PPI use and gastric non-cardia adenocarcinoma. Medscape Medical News

items.title: How Hospital Medicine Is Poised to Evolve This Year
items.description: Changes are coming, but this remains true: Hospitalists will be asked for more as their expertise grows. Medscape Medical News

items.title: Risk Factors for Early Development of Food Allergies
items.description: The study found multiple childhood food allergy risk factors but no link to vaccines. Medscape Medical News

items.title: Doctors Risk Becoming ‘Liability Sink’ for AI Errors
